coastal_outpost.title: Build a coastal outpost with a ship dock — stone pier + mooring post + supply chest

ocean_biome.title: Explore 3 distinct ocean biomes by ship — Warm Ocean, Cold Ocean, Deep Ocean

subtitle.text: The kingdom has coastlines. The coastlines have resources. The sea has biomes. Map them by ship.

description: CH.16 · THE COASTAL KINGDOM
▸ The Overworld has coastlines.
Every biome that touches water has unique resources.
Warm Ocean: Coral, Tropical Fish, Treasure Maps.
Cold Ocean: Cod, Salmon, underwater ruins.
Deep Ocean: Ocean Monuments, Elder Guardian, Sponge.
The Antique Atlas fills in your ocean biome coverage.
The ship makes the difference between a survey and a journey.
◈ OCEAN BIOME RESOURCES
└ Warm Ocean: Coral Blocks (decoration, bone meal source),
Tropical Fish, Sea Pickles (light source)
Aquamirae adds warm ocean exclusive content
└ Cold/Lukewarm Ocean: Cod + Salmon (fishing, Farmer's Delight),
Kelp (fuel, food), Sea Grass
└ Deep Ocean: Ocean Monument (Sponge + Gold Blocks, Elder Guardian),
Buried Treasure (Heart of the Sea → Conduit build)
Aquamirae structures may generate in deep ocean
◈ CONDUIT BUILD
└ Heart of the Sea: found in Buried Treasure (map from Shipwreck)
└ Conduit: Heart of the Sea + 8 Nautilus Shell → Conduit
Places in ocean: gives Conduit Power (water breathing +
night vision + haste) to nearby players
└ Conduit range: 32-96 blocks depending on activation prism size
└ Prism materials: Prismarine (Ocean Monument drops)
Full Conduit activation requires Ocean Monument clear
◈ COASTAL OUTPOST BUILD
└ Stone pier extending into water (8-12 blocks long)
└ Mooring post (any fence post): ties ship when docked
└ Supply chest: restocking stop for sea voyages
└ Torch/End Rod lighting: mark dock location at night
└ Antique Atlas marker: mark all coastal outpost locations
▸ The previous civilizations built inland.
They watched the ocean from their walls.
You are building the first coastal outpost
in this world's recorded history.
The Antique Atlas will show a marker at the coast.
That marker means: we went there.
We went there by ship.
We built something when we arrived.
▶ Build a coastal outpost with ship dock [check]
▶ Explore 3 distinct ocean biomes by ship [check]
◇ Tide/TidesDelight (fishing content mod): fishing in ocean biomes
yields Tide-specific fish with unique food stat profiles.',
Midas Touch fish (Tide): gold-related mechanic — check mod guide.
Coastal outpost near Warm Ocean is optimal for Tide fishing.
